prompt: Run the benchmark scenario with workload 'chatbot_synthetic.yaml' against endpoint 'http://vllm-eval:8000' in namespace 'default' for model 'google/gemma-4-31b-it'. Use GCS results bucket 'llm-d-benchmark'.
expected_output: Runs the benchmark script with chatbot_synthetic.yaml, validates endpoint, executes the dry run and real benchmark run, generates report, collects DCGM metrics, and copies reports to GCS.
assertions: The run_benchmark.sh script is invoked with chatbot_synthetic.yaml and http://vllm-eval:8000
The benchmark endpoint validation curl command was executed
The output report report_v0.2.json is generated
DCGM metrics are collected into dcgm_metrics.json
The report report_v0.2.json is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/
vllm_config.json is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/
dcgm_metrics.json is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/
output.csv is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/

prompt: Run the benchmark scenario with workload 'sanity_random.yaml' against http://vllm-eval:8000. Enable the Managed Prometheus check by setting the cluster name to 'eval-cluster' and zone to 'us-east1-b'.
expected_output: Benchmark executes and verifies Managed Prometheus configuration on GKE.
assertions: The script run_benchmark.sh is called with CLUSTER_NAME='eval-cluster' and ZONE='us-east1-b' environment variables set
A gcloud container clusters describe command was run to check managedPrometheusConfig
The benchmark execution output confirms Managed Prometheus is enabled
